product_surfaces: internal/cli/cli.go — commands slice includes search_sources; case 'search','search_sources' in dispatch switch; calls svc.SearchSources with resolved args; renders results via renderSearchText or renderJSON; help path prints command help via printCommandHelp

internal/cli/cli_test.go — TestSearchSourcesCommandJSON validates matching query returns non-empty SearchSourcesResult JSON; TestSearchSourcesCommandEmptyJSON validates non-matching query exits 0 with empty results and empty stderr; TestSearchJSON and TestMinimumReplacementBar preserve existing search behavior; TestQueryCommandsUseServiceOnly verifies search_sources routes through service SearchSources

internal/service/service.go — Service.SearchSources validates repo/query, delegates to store.SearchSources, enriches results with source metadata, and returns empty result sets without cache_empty on no-match
internal/cache/store.go — SQLiteStore.SearchSources uses FTS/fallback source search paths and returns empty slices on no-match
cmd/gitcode-mcp/main.go — search_sources reaches cli.Execute through runCLICompatibility
freshness: Current binary built in task directory and current Go test packages with fixture-synced cache data; deterministic offline validation; no live env vars
validation_scope: All validation artifacts written only under tests/design_package/022-cmd-gitcode-mcp-task-7-change-search_sources-cli-command-handler/. Binary build target is inside task directory during run.sh execution, not repo root.

live_validation.reason: Validation is offline and fixture/cache-backed only; no live GitCode API access needed
